beginner.question: Which type of electromagnetic radiation has the highest energy?
beginner.explanation: Gamma rays have the shortest wavelength and highest frequency.

beginner.question: Which type of electromagnetic radiation has the lowest energy?
beginner.explanation: Radio waves have the longest wavelength and lowest frequency.

beginner.question: The first law of thermodynamics states that energy cannot be either...
beginner.explanation: The first law of thermodynamics states that energy cannot be either created or destoryed.

intermediate.question: Given an energy in eV, select the correct Joule equivalent.
intermediate.explanation: 1 eV is defined as 1.602 x 10^-19 Joules.

hard.question: A C-H bond has energy 4 eV. What is this in kJ/mol (to the nearest 10)?
hard.explanation: 4 eV x 1.602e-19 J (convert to J) x 6.022e23 (per molecule) ÷ 1000 (convert to kJ) = 385.89 kJ/mol = 390 kJ/mol (to the nearest 10)
